credentials.account: none (no sign-in needed for viewer tests)

steps.expected: generateShareToken() uses crypto.randomBytes(32) and base64url encoding
steps.observed: generateShareToken() calls randomBytes(32), encodes with .toString('base64url'), strips padding — produces 43-char base64url tokens

steps.action: Run Vitest: bun run test -- --reporter=verbose src/lib/auth/__tests__/viewer.test.ts
steps.expected: All generateShareToken tests pass (format, uniqueness, hash correctness)
steps.observed: All 38 tests passed. Specific tests confirm: 43-char base64url tokens, base64url charset only (no +/=/), 64-char hex SHA-256 hash, hash matches hashToken(rawToken), 100 unique tokens generated, 100 unique hashes generated

evidence.testOutput: 38 passed (0 failed). Key tests: 'produces a 43-character base64url token' ✓, 'produces a base64url-encoded token (no +, /, = padding)' ✓, 'generates unique tokens across multiple calls' ✓ (100 tokens all unique), 'generates unique hashes across multiple calls' ✓ (100 hashes all unique), 'tokenHash is the SHA-256 of the raw token' ✓
evidence.sourceVerification: src/lib/auth/viewer.ts line 68: const bytes = randomBytes(32); line 69: const rawToken = bytes.toString('base64url').replace(/=+$/, ''); line 70: const tokenHash = hashToken(rawToken); — hashToken uses createHash('sha256').update(rawToken).digest('hex')

blockers.description: POST /api/viewer/validate API route does not exist — no file at src/app/api/viewer/validate/route.ts. This endpoint is part of the API milestone and has not been implemented yet. The underlying library functions (generateShareToken, validateShareToken, issueViewerJwt, verifyViewerJwt) are fully implemented and pass all 38 unit tests.
